cupertino.description: Offline Apple documentation (300K+ pages), HIG, Swift Evolution proposals
cupertino.setup: brew tap mihaelamj/tap && brew install cupertino && cupertino setup

swift-patterns.description: SwiftUI best practices from Sundell, SwiftLee, Point-Free, Nil Coalescing

xcodebuild.description: Build and test iOS Xcode projects via LLM

simctl.description: iOS Simulator control: boot, apps, permissions, screenshots, push notifications

apple-hig.description: Apple Human Interface Guidelines + API documentation search

xcodeproj.description: Programmatic .xcodeproj manipulation: targets, files, build settings, packages

app-store-connect.description: App Store Connect: metadata, beta testing, analytics, releases
app-store-connect.setup: Requires App Store Connect API key from https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/access/api
